NotFound.title: The thread ends here.

About.body: My name is Thibault Deverge. For five years I've turned complex problems into simple, obvious interfaces — from the first design stroke to the last line of code. Next.js, TypeScript, an obsession with the right motion and an eye that never lets a detail slide. My path is anything but linear: the thread is exactly what ties it together.

Home.subtitle: Complete web applications, from the interface to the database. Day to day on Elloha's SaaS, used by 10,000+ tourism professionals — and freelance platforms carried solo all the way to production.
